body: import org.junit.Test;
import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunnerParameters;
import org.junit.runner.RunWith;
import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunner;
import org.apache.commons.codec.language.RefinedSoundex;
import static org.evosuite.runtime.EvoAssertions.*;
import static org.junit.Assert.*;

translation: # Parameter supplied to RefinedSoundex encode is not of type java.lang.String
assert isinstance(e, TypeError), "Expected TypeError, but got {}".format(type(e))
assert str(e) == "Parameter supplied to RefinedSoundex encode is not of type java.lang.String"
# no message in exception (getMessage() returned null)
